{% load i18n %} {% load static %}

{% trans "What's Binance?" %}

{% trans "Binance is one of the world's largest cryptocurrency exchanges by trading volume. It offers a comprehensive platform for trading various cryptocurrencies, including spot trading, futures, options, and more." %}
{% trans 'The platform is known for its:' %}

  • {% trans 'High liquidity and trading volume' %}
  • {% trans 'Wide range of supported cryptocurrencies' %}
  • {% trans 'Advanced trading features' %}
  • {% trans 'Robust API for automated trading' %}

{% trans 'What can you trade with Binance?' %}

{% trans 'With Binance, you can trade the following:' %}

  • {% trans 'Spot' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in base asset units. Your account must have sufficient base and quote assets to trade in both directions.' %}
  • {% trans 'USDT-M Futures' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in base asset units.' %}
  • {% trans 'COIN-M Futures' %}: {% trans 'Quantity is measured in contract units.' %}

{% trans 'USDT-M and COIN-M Futures' %}: {% trans 'Margin and leverage settings can be adjusted directly from the Binance exchange platform.' %}

{% trans "USDT-M and COIN-M Futures" %}: {% trans "Make sure your futures account is set to" %} {% trans "Hedge Mode" %} {% trans "if you want to use dual-side trading." %}

{% trans 'API Key Setup Process' %}

{% trans 'follow the steps below to configure your API Keys.' %}

{% include 'include/warnings.html' with warning='Never share your API keys with anyone. Our platform uses industry-standard encryption to protect your credentials.' %}

1 {% trans 'Create a Binance Account' %}

{% trans "Sign up for a Binance account if you don't have one." %} {% trans 'Sign up here' %} {% trans '.' %}

2 {% trans 'Access API Management' %}

  1. {% trans 'Log in to your Binance account' %}
  2. {% trans 'Click on your profile icon in the top-right corner' %}
  3. {% trans 'Select "API Management" from the dropdown menu' %}

3 {% trans 'Create API Key' %}

  1. {% trans 'Click "Create API"' %}
  2. {% trans 'Choose "System generated"' %}
  3. {% trans 'Give your API key a descriptive name.' %}

4 {% trans 'Configure Security Settings' %}

  1. {% trans 'Enable "Restrict access to trusted IPs only"' %}
  2. {% trans "Add our server's IP address:" %} {{ server_ip }}

5 {% trans 'Set Trading Permissions' %}

{% trans 'Enable the following permissions based on your needs:' %}

  • {% trans 'Spot & Margin Trading' %}
  • {% trans 'Futures Trading' %}

{% trans 'IMPORTANT: Make sure to copy your secret key before clicking save.' %}

{% trans 'Complete Integration' %}

{% trans "Once you have your API keys, return to our platform's Automate section and use them to link your Binance account with our automation system. This will enable automated trading based on your TradingView alerts." %}

{% comment %}

6 {% trans 'Complete Integration' %}

{% trans 'Copy your API credentials and paste them in the add Binance form.' %}

{% endcomment %} {% comment %}

{% trans 'Need help?' %}

{% trans 'If you encounter any issues during the integration process, our support team is here to help. Contact us' %} {% trans 'here' %} {% trans '.' %}

{% endcomment %}
